mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kb_document WHERE is_delete = 0
SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM ai_conversation WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT agent_name as name, agent_type as type, create_time as createTime FROM agent_config ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT name, kb_type as kbType, create_time as createTime FROM kb_knowledge ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT title, agent_type as agentType, create_time as createTime FROM ai_conversation ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 5
